name: Upsells: Weekly Opportunities

title.fr: Rapport hebdomadaire des opportunites de vente additionnelle
title.es: Informe semanal de oportunidades de venta adicional
title.ro: Raport saptamanal de oportunitati de upsell

description.en: Automatically identify the best upsell opportunities for the week based on upcoming appointments and customer history.
description.de: Automatisch die besten Upsell-Chancen der Woche basierend auf anstehenden Terminen und Kundenhistorie identifizieren.
description.fr: Identifier automatiquement les meilleures opportunites de vente additionnelle de la semaine en fonction des rendez-vous a venir et de l historique client.
description.es: Identificar automaticamente las mejores oportunidades de venta adicional de la semana basadas en citas proximas e historial de clientes.
description.ro: Identifica automat cele mai bune oportunitati de upsell ale saptamanii pe baza programarilor viitoare si a istoricului clientilor.

bot: When this warp is triggered: fetches follow-up candidates and analyzes them for upsell opportunities. This is a report for the business owner.

actions.prompt: Analyze these customers and identify the top 3-5 upsell opportunities for this week. For each, name the customer, suggest what to recommend, and explain why. Format as an actionable list.

success.fr: Rapport hebdomadaire des opportunites de vente additionnelle genere.
success.es: Informe semanal de oportunidades de venta adicional generado.
success.ro: Raport saptamanal de oportunitati de upsell generat.
